scripts.watch: concurrently --kill-others 'esbuild js/app.js --bundle --format=esm --loader:.html=text --outfile=assets/app.bundle.js --watch' 'tailwindcss -i css/main.css -o ./assets/main.css --watch' 'FLASK_APP=app.py FLASK_ENV=development flask --debug run'
scripts.copy-assets: cp node_modules/fork-awesome/css/fork-awesome.min.css assets/ && sed -i 's@../fonts/@@g' assets/fork-awesome.min.css && cp node_modules/fork-awesome/fonts/forkawesome-webfont.woff2 node_modules/fork-awesome/fonts/forkawesome-webfont.woff node_modules/fork-awesome/fonts/forkawesome-webfont.ttf assets/
